data.title: Modular Design
data.description: Uses a modular design approach to separate different functionalities for easier maintenance and updates.
data.technical_spec: Microservices architecture implemented for scalability and redundancy.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes cloud infrastructure to provide scalable and flexible resources for handling various workloads.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on AWS with Elastic Load Balancing and Auto Scaling features.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Robust management of user data and assets for efficient storage and retrieval.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes both SQL and NoSQL databases like MySQL and MongoDB.

data.title: API-Centric Development
data.description: APIs are implemented for interaction with external applications and services.
data.technical_spec: REST and GraphQL APIs used for various integrations.

data.title: High Availability Systems
data.description: Designed systems to ensure maximum operational uptime.
data.technical_spec: Redundant systems and failover mechanisms in place across global data centers.
